cover.headline: Europe will become part of your love story.
cover.subheadline: Destination wedding and couple photography across Europe, captured with intimacy, artistry, and emotion.

paris.title: Paris at Sunrise
paris.caption: The city of light, wrapped in golden morning haze — where every cobblestone whispers of love.

rome.title: Rome in Golden Light
rome.caption: Ancient streets bathed in amber — where timeless romance meets la dolce vita.

madrid.title: Madrid's Quiet Streets
madrid.caption: Intimate corners and hidden plazas — the soul of Spain in every stolen glance.
madrid.note: Late afternoon, Barrio de las Letras

lakeComo.title: Lake Como Elegance
lakeComo.caption: Where the Alps meet still waters — an Italian dream painted in silk and stone.

santorini.title: Santorini Textures
santorini.caption: White-washed walls against the Aegean blue — love written in light and salt.

tuscany.title: Tuscany Countryside Romance
tuscany.caption: Rolling hills and cypress-lined roads — where time slows for two.

inquiry.title: The Inquiry
inquiry.description: You reach out, and we begin dreaming together. A conversation about your love, your vision, and the European destination that calls to you.

planning.title: Planning the Journey
planning.description: Every detail is considered — locations, light, timing, and the quiet moments in between. We craft a bespoke session tailored to your story.

session.title: The Session Day
session.description: An unhurried day of connection and beauty. We wander, we laugh, we capture the in-between moments that become your most treasured memories.

editing.title: Editing & Delivery
editing.description: Each image is carefully curated and art-directed. Your gallery arrives as a cinematic visual story — ready to be relived again and again.

printed.title: Your Printed Memories
printed.description: A luxury album and fine art prints, designed to become a family heirloom. Your love story, bound in linen and paper.

routes.title: Love Across Europe
routes.subtitle: Routes & Destinations
routes.description: From the Seine to the Aegean — every destination holds a chapter of your story.

quotes.text: It felt like we were living inside a film.
quotes.author: Camille & Thomas

quotes.text: They captured our memories like art. Every photograph feels like a painting we want to live inside.
quotes.author: Sofia & Marco

quotes.text: The most beautiful day of our lives, documented with such tenderness and grace.
quotes.author: Elena & James

quotes.text: They didn't just take photos — they told our story.
quotes.author: Isabelle & Pierre

closing.headline: Your journey deserves to be remembered forever.

footer.destinations: Available in: Paris · Rome · Madrid · Lake Como · Santorini · Tuscany · Venice
